rationale: Educ. Code §29.251 defines 'community education' for its subchapter. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraisals, or Tax Code §11.13, so no conflict arises.
quote: "Community education" means the process by which the citizens in a school district, using the resources and facilities of the district, organize to support each other and to solve their mutual educational problems and meet their mutual lifelong needs.
_note: Rule text is a definitions section for community education; no operative connection to homestead exemption amounts.
